LanguageData.VGE_AncientOrbitalPlatform.label: ancient orbital platform
LanguageData.VGE_AsteroidIce.label: asteroid ice
LanguageData.VGE_Compressed_Vacstone_Floor.label: compressed vacstone
LanguageData.VGE_DamagedSubstructure.description: A warped and twisted section of gravship substructure. Once a solid truss with decking, it has been bent out of shape by heavy stress or impact. The grav engineâ€™s levitation field still grips it, but its integrity is compromised: any further damage will cause this piece of substructure to collapse completely.
LanguageData.VGE_DamagedSubstructure.label: damaged gravship substructure
LanguageData.VGE_FakeTerrain.label: fake terrain
LanguageData.VGE_GravshipSubscaffold.description: A scaffold layer built to support the framework of gravships. While part of the gravshipâ€™s structure, it cannot support buildings and slows movement significantly. It does not count toward the gravshipâ€™s substructure limit, making it ideal for walkways, access paths, or expansion staging areas.
LanguageData.VGE_GravshipSubscaffold.label: gravship subscaffold
LanguageData.VGE_MechanoidSubstructure.description: A mechanoid-made lightweight truss structure with flooring on top that forms the deck of a swarmship. Only things on top of this substructure can be lifted by the grav engine's levitation field.
LanguageData.VGE_MechanoidSubstructure.label: mechanoid substructure
